2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 
26 – 28 June 2026 
  
  
From The FIA Formula 1 Race Director    
  
To All Officials, All Teams     Date   25 June 2026 
  
                                                                             COMPETITION NOTES  
       
General Instructions  
1. Laps during Qualifying Session and Reconnaissance Lap(s), 
For the safe and orderly conduct of the Competition, other than in exceptional circumstances 
accepted as such by the Stewards, any driver that exceeds the maximum time from the Second 
Safety Car Line to  the First Safety Car Line on ANY lap during and after the Qualifying Session, 
including in-laps and out-laps or during reconnaissance laps when the pit exit is opened for the Race, 
may be deemed to be going unnecessarily slowly.  
Teams and Drivers will be informed of the maximum time after the second Pract
